title: Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken

seo.title: Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken Recipe | Crispy & Authentic
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken at home! Get our authentic, crispy, and spicy recipe with step-by-step instructions. Perfect for dinner!
longTailKeywords: how to make Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken
easy Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken recipe
Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken step by step
best Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken at home
lowCompetitionKeywords: crispy Korean fried chicken at home
seo.h1: The Best Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken Recipe
h2Headings: What is Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken?
Pro Tips for Crispy Korean Fried Chicken
seo.imageAlt: A plate of crispy Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken with a sweet and spicy red sauce, garnished with sesame seeds and green onions.
seo.imageCaption: Get ready to indulge in the ultimate crispy, sweet, and spicy Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken experience right in your own kitchen!

description: Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken is a beloved dish featuring incredibly crispy fried chicken coated in a sticky, sweet, and spicy gochujang-based sauce. This iconic Korean comfort food offers a perfect balance of flavors and textures, making it an irresistible treat for any occasion. Prepare to experience a delightful explosion of taste with every bite of this truly authentic recipe.

instructions.title: Prepare the Chicken
instructions.text: Pat dry the chicken pieces thoroughly with paper towels. Season them generously with salt, black pepper, ginger powder, and garlic powder. Let the chicken sit for 10-15 minutes.

instructions.title: Make the Frying Batter
instructions.text: In a large bowl, whisk together the all-purpose flour, cornstarch, and baking powder. Gradually add cold water, mixing until you achieve a smooth, pancake-like batter. Do not overmix; some lumps are fine. The batter should be thin enough to coat the chicken lightly.

instructions.title: First Fry the Chicken
instructions.text: Heat vegetable oil in a large pot or deep fryer to 350F (175C). Dip each chicken piece into the batter, ensuring it's evenly coated, then carefully place it into the hot oil. Fry in batches for 6-8 minutes, until lightly golden and cooked through. Remove and drain on a wire rack.

instructions.title: Prepare the Yangnyeom Sauce
instructions.text: While the chicken is frying, combine gochujang, ketchup, soy sauce, rice vinegar, honey or corn syrup, minced garlic, and sesame oil in a small saucepan. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer over medium-low heat, stirring constantly for 2-3 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly and is glossy. Remove from heat.

instructions.title: Second Fry for Extra Crispiness
instructions.text: Increase the oil temperature to 375F (190C). Return the first-fried chicken to the hot oil and fry for another 2-4 minutes, or until deeply golden brown and extra crispy. This double-frying method is key to authentic Korean fried chicken texture. Remove and drain well.

instructions.title: Coat and Serve
instructions.text: Immediately transfer the hot, crispy chicken to a large bowl. Pour the warm Yangnyeom sauce over the chicken and toss gently to ensure every piece is thoroughly coated. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions. Serve hot and enjoy the perfect balance of sweet, spicy, and savory flavors.

tips: For the ultimate crispiness, do not skip the double-frying step. The first fry cooks the chicken, and the second fry at a higher temperature makes the skin incredibly crunchy.
Adjust the amount of gochujang to your preferred spice level. For a sweeter sauce, add a bit more honey or corn syrup. Corn syrup gives a beautiful gloss and helps the sauce adhere better.

Yangnyeom chicken is best enjoyed immediately while still hot and crispy. If you have leftovers, reheat them in an air fryer or oven to regain some crispiness, though it won't be quite the same as fresh.
article: Yangnyeom Korean Fried Chicken is a beloved Korean Chicken Recipes dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
